zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Bigod 2nd Earl of Norfolk於1095年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可時，他的父親Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk47歲，母親Adelise de Tosny32歲。他於大約1143年與Juliana de Vere結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他於1123年在英國英格蘭被列為high steward also called king's dapifer。他去世於1175年3月6日在巴勒斯坦享年80歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可特福德。

nameMeanings.name: Bigod
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Jaroslaw, Jozef, Krystyna, Slawomir.

Polish and Jewish (from Poland): from bigos, formerlydenoting anything that was chopped or slashed, now a particular dishcomposed of hash and sauerkraut; also ‘confusion’; hence perhaps anickname for someone who caused confusion.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Bigod 2nd Earl of Norfolk was born in 1095, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk, was 47 and his mother, Adelise de Tosny, was 32. He married Juliana de Vere about 1143. They were the parents of at least 1 son. In 1123, at the age of 28, his occupation is listed as high steward also called king's dapifer in England, United Kingdom. He died on 6 March 1175, in Palestine, at the age of 80, and was buried in Thetford, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Bigod 2nd Earl of Norfolk est né en 1095, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Adelise de Tosny, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Juliana de Vere environ 1143. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. En 1123, à l’âge de 28 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est high steward also called king's dapifer à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 6 mars 1175, à Palestine, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterré à Thetford, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.Framlingham Castle, Norfolk, England: Framlingham Castle, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh Bigod 2nd Earl of Norfolk 1095 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk 47 und seine Mutter Adelise de Tosny 32. Er hat um 1143 Juliana de Vere geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. 1123, als er 28 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als high steward also called king's dapifer in England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 6. März 1175 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Palästina und wurde in Thetford, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Bigod 2nd Earl of Norfolk è nato il nel 1095 nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Adelise de Tosny, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Juliana de Vere circa 1143. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Nel 1123, all'età di 28 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come high steward also called king's dapifer nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 6 marzo 1175, nel Palestina, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolto a Thetford, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Bigod 2nd Earl of Norfolkが1095年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクで生まれた時，父Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolkは47歳，母Adelise de Tosnyは32歳であった。約1143年にJuliana de Vereと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。1123年，28歳の時，イギリスイギリスでの職業はhigh steward also called king's dapiferと記録されている。彼は1175年3月6日にパレスチナで80歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクスエトフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Bigod 2nd Earl of Norfolk(이)가 1095년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelise de Tosny(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1143년 Juliana de Vere(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 1123년, 28세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드에서 high steward also called king's dapifer이었다. 그는 1175년 3월 6일 팔레스타인에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 테트퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Bigod 2nd Earl of Norfolk nasceu em 1095, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Adelise de Tosny, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Juliana de Vere aproximadamente 1143. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Em 1123, com 28 anos, sua profissão aparece como high steward also called king's dapifer em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 6 de março de 1175, em Palestina, com 80 anos, e foi sepultado em Thetford, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ro.Framlingham Castle, Norfolk, England: Framlingham Castle, Suffolk, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Bigod 2nd Earl of Norfolk родился в 1095 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelise de Tosny, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Juliana de Vere около 1143 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. В 1123 году, в возрасте 28 лет,  он работал по профессии high steward also called king's dapifer в местности Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 6 марта 1175 г. в местности Палестина в возрасте 80 лет и был похоронен в местности тетфорд, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh Bigod 2nd Earl of Norfolk nació en 1095, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Roger Bigod 1st Earl of Norfolk, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Adelise de Tosny, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Juliana de Vere aproximadamente 1143. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. En 1123, a la edad de 28 años, su ocupación registrada era high steward also called king's dapifer en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 6 de marzo de 1175, en Palestina, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultado en Thetford, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
